hero.title: Objevte Egypt s
hero.subtitle: Prozkoumejte křišťálově čisté vody Rudého moře, vydejte se na cestu pouští Sahara a objevte starověké divy Luxoru — to vše s odbornými průvodci po vašem boku.

excursions.subtitle: Naše zájezdy a exkurze
excursions.title: Nezapomenutelná
excursions.description: Od hlubin Rudého moře až po zlaté písky Sahary — všechny výlety vyrážejí z Hurghady.
excursions.luxorCairo: Výlety do Luxoru a Káhiry (z Hurghady)

whyChooseUs.subtitle: Proč si vybrat nás
whyChooseUs.title: Váš spolehlivý
whyChooseUs.description: Děláme maximum pro to, aby bylo vaše dobrodružství v Egyptě opravdu výjimečné.
whyChooseUs.professionalGuidesDesc: Zkušení certifikovaní místní průvodci, kteří oživují Egypt.
whyChooseUs.bestPricesDesc: Konkurenční ceny bez skrytých poplatků. Zaručená hodnota.
whyChooseUs.safeTripsDesc: Vaše bezpečnost je naší nejvyšší prioritou, všechny výlety jsou plně pojištěné.
whyChooseUs.highQualityDesc: Prémiové vybavení, pohodlná doprava a důraz na detail.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Výlet na šnorchlování byl naprosto kouzelný! Profesionální posádka a úchvatné korálové útesy. Nejlepší zážitek v Hurghadě!

reviews.name: Hans W.
reviews.text: Rezervovali jsme si pouštní safari s Fayed Travel — jízda na čtyřkolkách a projížďka na velbloudech při západu slunce byly nezapomenutelné. Vřele doporučuji!

reviews.name: Maria L.
reviews.text: Jednodenní výlet do Luxoru byl perfektně zorganizovaný. Průvodce byl neuvěřitelně znalý a chrámy byly ohromující. Určitě stojí za to!

reviews.name: James R.
reviews.text: Od rezervace až po samotný výlet proběhlo vše bez problémů. Skvělé ceny, přátelský tým a úžasné zážitky. 10/10!

contact.subtitle: Kontaktujte nás
contact.title: Rezervujte si své
contact.description: Jste připraveni objevovat? Napište nám a my naplánujeme váš dokonalý výlet.
contact.name: Vaše jméno

footer.description: Váš spolehlivý partner pro nezapomenutelná dobrodružství v Hurghadě. Mořské výlety, pouštní safari a jednodenní výlety do Luxoru a Káhiry.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Fayed International Travel. Všechna práva vyhrazena.

aboutUs.title: Welcome to
aboutUs.subtitle: Your trusted partner for unforgettable travel experiences in Egypt
aboutUs.intro: Fayed International Travel Agency is an Egyptian travel company specialized in organizing tours and travel services across Egypt. We offer unforgettable experiences in the Red Sea, Cairo, Luxor, Aswan, and desert safari destinations.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive travel solutions designed to exceed your expectations
services.hotelReservationsDesc: Carefully selected accommodations to suit every budget and preference
services.airportTransfersDesc: Reliable and comfortable transportation from arrival to departure
services.privateToursDesc: Tailored experiences with expert local guides
services.seaTripsDesc: Explore the stunning Red Sea marine life
services.desertSafariDesc: Thrilling journeys across Egypt's golden landscapes
services.customPackagesDesc: Personalized itineraries designed around your dreams

partnership.title: International
partnership.point1: We operate as an official tourism representative in Egypt, committed to the highest standards of service and professionalism
partnership.point2: We proudly cooperate with international travel partners through our dedicated B2B services
partnership.point3: Our services are tailored for European and international markets, ensuring seamless experiences for global travelers
partnership.point4: We focus on reliability, consistency, and service quality to build lasting partnerships

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.value1: Deliver professional service at every touchpoint
mission.value2: Ensure safety and comfort throughout your journey

closing.text1: At Fayed International Travel Agency, we believe that travel is more than just a trip — it is an experience.
closing.text2: Let us turn your journey into a memory you will never forget.

b2b.title: B2B Partnership
b2b.subtitle: Your trusted local executing partner in Egypt
b2b.intro1: We are a professional Egypt-based tour operator and ground handling partner providing reliable B2B services for international travel agencies and tour operators.
b2b.intro2: As a local executing agent in Egypt, we specialize in delivering high-quality travel services for European markets, ensuring smooth operations, competitive rates, and excellent client satisfaction.

whoWeAre.title: Who We Are
whoWeAre.description: We act as a trusted local representative and executing partner in Egypt, offering full destination management services (DMC) with strong operational control on the ground.

services.title: Our B2B Services in Egypt
services.subtitle: Comprehensive solutions tailored for international travel partners

list.dailyExcursions: Daily excursions in Hurghada, Cairo & Luxor
list.boatTrips: Red Sea boat trips & snorkeling tours

advantages.title: Why Partner With Us?
advantages.competitiveRatesDesc: Best pricing for travel agency partners
advantages.fastResponseDesc: Dedicated B2B support team ready to assist

cooperation.text1: We focus exclusively on bringing foreign clients to Egypt and operating their programs professionally from arrival to departure.
cooperation.quote: If you are looking for a reliable local partner in Egypt to handle your clients with care and professionalism, we are ready for cooperation on a B2B basis.
cooperation.contactPrompt: Contact us for our B2B rate list and partnership proposal.

orangeBayIsland.title: Orange Bay Island
orangeBayIsland.description: Visit the stunning Orange Bay Island with its pristine white sand beaches and crystal-clear turquoise waters. A perfect full-day escape in the Red Sea.

paradiseIsland.title: Paradise Island
paradiseIsland.description: Discover Paradise Island — a breathtaking destination with white sandy shores, ideal for swimming, sunbathing, and snorkeling in the Red Sea.

dolphinHouse.title: Dolphin House
dolphinHouse.description: Swim alongside wild dolphins in their natural habitat at Dolphin House reef. An unforgettable marine encounter with professional guides.

scubaDivingIntro.title: Scuba Diving Intro
scubaDivingIntro.description: Take your first breath underwater with a professional scuba diving introduction. No experience needed — explore the Red Sea's vibrant coral reefs.

privateSpeedboat.title: Private Speedboat
privateSpeedboat.description: Enjoy an exclusive private speedboat experience along the coast. Snorkel at pristine spots with your own captain and crew. This tour is available in both Hurghada and El Gouna.

glassBoat.title: Glass Boat
glassBoat.description: See the magical underwater world without getting wet! The yellow glass-bottom boat reveals stunning coral reefs and colorful fish beneath you. This tour is available in both Hurghada and El Gouna.

catamaranTrip.title: Catamaran Trip
catamaranTrip.description: Catamaran trips are relaxing sea experiences in El Gouna, suitable for individuals, couples, and groups.

quadBikeSafari.title: Quad Bike Safari
quadBikeSafari.description: Race across the golden sand dunes of the Sahara on powerful quad bikes. An adrenaline-filled desert adventure with Bedouin tea.

superSafari.title: Super Safari (Quad + Jeep + Camel)
superSafari.description: The ultimate desert experience combining quad biking, jeep safari, and camel riding. Includes a traditional Bedouin dinner and show. This tour is available in both Hurghada and El Gouna.

cityTourHurghada.title: City Tour – Hurghada
cityTourHurghada.description: A city sightseeing tour around Hurghada that allows visitors to explore the local lifestyle and main attractions.

grandAquariumHurghada.title: Grand Aquarium – Hurghada
grandAquariumHurghada.description: The Aquarium Tour is one of the best family-friendly entertainment experiences in Hurghada, combining marine life observation with educational and interactive attractions.

horseRidingHurghada.title: Horse Riding Tour – Hurghada
horseRidingHurghada.description: Horse riding tours in Hurghada are suitable for all ages and offer a unique mix of natural scenery and enjoyable physical activity.

luxorTrip.title: Luxor Trip
luxorTrip.description: Journey to the ancient city of Luxor and explore the world's greatest open-air museum. Visit temples, tombs, and legendary monuments.

cairoTrip.title: Cairo Trip
cairoTrip.description: Explore the iconic Pyramids of Giza, the Sphinx, and the Egyptian Museum on an unforgettable day trip to Cairo from Hurghada.

airportTransfer.title: Airport Transfer – Hurghada
airportTransfer.description: Private and shared transfer services from Hurghada International Airport to hotels, resorts, El Gouna, Makadi Bay, Sahl Hasheesh, and other nearby destinations.

nileCruise.title: Nile Cruise
nileCruise.description: Experience unforgettable Nile River cruise adventures with multiple options to suit your schedule. Choose from dinner cruises, lunch cruises, pharaonic shows, or multi-day journeys along Egypt's legendary river.

tourIncludes.marineAnimals: More than 1,200 marine animals representing around 100 species
tourIncludes.toursAlongSandyBeaches: Tours along sandy beaches or nearby desert areas
tourIncludes.suitableForBeginnersAndExperienced: Suitable for beginners and experienced riders
tourIncludes.basicHorseRidingTraining: Basic horse riding training and guidance
tourIncludes.ridingPaceAdjusted: Riding pace adjusted to participant skill level
